_meta.note: Curated Undertale supporting-cast lore in our OWN words. FREE-bucket world knowledge. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW.
_meta.wall: Who these characters are in the world; never the player's save state.

docs.title: Napstablook
docs.text: Napstablook is a shy, melancholy ghost who makes music and lives near Waterfall. Gentle and easily discouraged, they are a cousin of Mettaton and offer some of the quietest, kindest moments in the Underground.

docs.title: Mad Dummy
docs.text: The Mad Dummy is a temperamental training dummy possessed by a ghost, encountered in Waterfall — loud, easily enraged, and oddly endearing.

docs.title: Temmie
docs.text: Temmies are a quirky cat-dog-like species living in a hidden village off Waterfall, speaking in their own excitable broken grammar. Their shop can fund 'tem college,' and they are equal parts adorable and chaotic.

docs.title: Greater Dog
docs.text: Greater Dog is an enthusiastic armored dog of the Snowdin guard who pilots a suit of armor and just wants to play and be petted.

docs.title: Doggo
docs.text: Doggo is a Snowdin sentry who can only see moving things. Stay still and he loses track of you — a nervous but good-hearted member of the canine guard.

docs.title: Muffet
docs.text: Muffet is a five-eyed spider who runs a pastry bake sale in Hotland to support her spider clan. Charming and ruthless about her prices, she expects the human to pay up — preferably for spider cider.

docs.title: Monster Kid
docs.text: Monster Kid is an armless, eager young monster who idolizes Undyne and tags along through Waterfall, tripping a lot and cheering the human on without quite understanding the stakes.
